source.name: SPY + RSP adjusted-close CSV (design reference)
source.operatorSource: Yahoo Finance v8 chart API — v1.9b.1a operator calibration reference only
source.note: EXAMPLE / DESIGN ONLY — values from v1.9b.1a calibration run for schema and validator tests. Not used in GhostFlow score, buildSnapshot, or dashboard. Production artifact requires operator-verified CSV refresh via npm run ghostflow:cap-weight-premium-study; not runtime Yahoo fetch.

methodology.inputDescription: Operator-provided SPY and RSP daily CSV with Date and Adj Close columns
methodology.spreadDefinition: SPY total return minus RSP total return over rolling windows
methodology.percentileDefinition: Percentile of current spread or ratio versus aligned history since overlap start

caveats: SPY/RSP proxy — not causal proof of passive-flow attribution
Not an AI-bubble signal; not trading advice or allocation guidance
Adjusted-close data required for production-quality artifact
ETF fees, tracking drift, and RSP quarterly rebalance mechanics add noise
Display-only by default; no Research Composite impact
